sentences.target: Der Bewohner klingelt unten am Eingang.

translations.de: Der Bewohner klingelt unten am Eingang.
translations.en: The resident rings downstairs at the entrance.
translations.es: El vecino toca el timbre abajo, en la entrada.
translations.fr: Le résident sonne en bas à l'entrée.
translations.zh-Hans: 住户在楼下门口按门铃。
translations.yue: 住戶喺樓下入口撳門鈴。
translations.pt: O morador toca a campainha na entrada lá embaixo.
translations.tr: Apartman sakini aşağıda girişte zile basıyor.
translations.vi: Cư dân bấm chuông ở cửa chính tầng trệt.
translations.ar: المقيم يقرع الجرس في الأسفل عند المدخل.
translations.nl: De bewoner belt beneden bij de ingang aan.
translations.hu: A lakó lent a bejáratnál csenget.
translations.hi: निवासी नीचे प्रवेश द्वार पर घंटी बजा रहा है.
translations.pl: Lokator dzwoni na dole przy wejściu.
translations.el: Ο ένοικος χτυπάει το κουδούνι κάτω στην είσοδο.
translations.nb: Beboeren ringer på nede ved inngangen.
translations.id: Penghuni menekan bel di bawah, di pintu masuk.
translations.sv: En boende ringer på nere vid entrén.
translations.da: Beboeren ringer på nede ved indgangen.
translations.ja: 住人が下の入口でインターホンを押している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular; determines the subject noun.
Masculine noun in nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Adverb of place; modifies the verb to indicate location.
Preposition ‘an’ fused with definite article (an dem); governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Masculine noun in dative singular as the complement of the preposition.

sentences.target: Ich kenne den neuen Bewohner oben.

translations.de: Ich kenne den neuen Bewohner oben.
translations.en: I know the new resident upstairs.
translations.es: Conozco al nuevo vecino de arriba.
translations.fr: Je connais le nouveau résident de l'étage au-dessus.
translations.it: Conosco il nuovo inquilino di sopra.
translations.ru: Я знаю нового жильца с верхнего этажа.
translations.pt: Eu conheço o novo morador de cima.
translations.he: אני מכיר את הדייר החדש מלמעלה.
translations.vi: Tôi biết cư dân mới ở tầng trên.
translations.ar: أنا أعرف المقيم الجديد في الطابق العلوي.
translations.nl: Ik ken de nieuwe bewoner van boven.
translations.uk: Я знаю нового мешканця з верхнього поверху.
translations.hi: मैं ऊपर वाले नए निवासी को जानता हूँ.
translations.el: Ξέρω τον νέο ένοικο από πάνω.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner den nye beboeren i etasjen over.
translations.id: Saya kenal penghuni baru di lantai atas.
translations.sv: Jag känner den nya hyresgästen där uppe.
translations.ro: Îl cunosc pe noul locatar de la etajul de sus.
translations.da: Jeg kender den nye beboer ovenpå.
translations.ja: 上の階の新しい住人を知っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative, 1st person singular; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive predicate.
Definite article in accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object NP.
Attributive adjective, accusative masculine singular; weak inflection after definite article; modifies ‘Bewohner’.
Masculine noun in accusative singular; direct object of ‘kenne’.
Adverb of place; adds locational information (modifies the clause/verb).

sentences.target: Ein Bewohner sucht seinen Schlüssel im Hof.
sentences.reading: /aɪn bəˈvoːnɐ zʊxt ˈzaɪnən ˈʃlʏsəl ɪm hoːf/

translations.de: Ein Bewohner sucht seinen Schlüssel im Hof.
translations.ipa: /aɪn bəˈvoːnɐ zʊxt ˈzaɪnən ˈʃlʏsəl ɪm hoːf/
translations.en: A resident is looking for his key in the yard.
translations.es: Un vecino busca su llave en el patio.
translations.fr: Un voisin cherche sa clé dans la cour.
translations.it: Un inquilino cerca la sua chiave nel cortile.
translations.ko: 한 주민이 마당에서 열쇠를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 一位住户在院子里找他的钥匙。
translations.yue: 有個住戶喺天井度搵佢把鎖匙。
translations.ru: Один жилец ищет свой ключ во дворе.
translations.pt: Um morador procura sua chave no pátio.
translations.he: דייר מחפש את המפתח שלו בחצר.
translations.vi: Một cư dân đang tìm chìa khóa của mình ở sân.
translations.ar: أحد المقيمين يبحث عن مفتاحه في الساحة.
translations.nl: Een bewoner zoekt zijn sleutel op de binnenplaats.
translations.uk: Один мешканець шукає свій ключ у дворі.
translations.hu: Egy lakó az udvaron keresi a kulcsát.
translations.hi: एक निवासी आंगन में अपनी चाबी ढूँढ़ रहा है.
translations.pl: Jeden z lokatorów szuka swojego klucza na podwórku.
translations.el: Ένας ένοικος ψάχνει το κλειδί του στην αυλή.
translations.nb: En beboer leter etter nøkkelen sin i gården.
translations.id: Seorang penghuni sedang mencari kuncinya di halaman.
translations.sv: En hyresgäst letar efter sin nyckel på gården.
translations.ro: Un locatar își caută cheia în curte.
translations.cs: Jeden nájemník hledá svůj klíč na dvoře.
translations.da: En beboer leder efter sin nøgle i gården.
translations.ja: ある住人が中庭で鍵を探している。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article in nominative masculine singular; introduces the subject NP.
Masculine noun in nominative singular; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive predicate.
Possessive determiner, accusative masculine singular; agrees with ‘Schlüssel’ and marks possession.
Masculine noun in accusative singular; direct object of ‘sucht’.
Preposition ‘in’ fused with definite article (in dem); governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Masculine noun in dative singular as complement of the preposition.

sentences.target: Der ältere Bewohner braucht heute Hilfe.

translations.de: Der ältere Bewohner braucht heute Hilfe.
translations.en: The older resident needs help today.
translations.es: El vecino mayor necesita ayuda hoy.
translations.fr: Le résident âgé a besoin d'aide aujourd'hui.
translations.it: L'anziano inquilino ha bisogno di aiuto oggi.
translations.ko: 나이 많은 주민이 오늘 도움이 필요해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 年长的住户今天需要帮助。
translations.yue: 年長嘅住戶今日需要幫手。
translations.pt: O morador idoso precisa de ajuda hoje.
translations.tr: Yaşlı sakin bugün yardıma ihtiyaç duyuyor.
translations.vi: Cư dân lớn tuổi hôm nay cần được giúp đỡ.
translations.ar: المقيم المسن يحتاج إلى مساعدة اليوم.
translations.nl: De oudere bewoner heeft vandaag hulp nodig.
translations.hu: Az idősebb lakónak ma segítségre van szüksége.
translations.hi: बुज़ुर्ग निवासी को आज मदद की ज़रूरत है.
translations.el: Ο ηλικιωμένος ένοικος χρειάζεται σήμερα βοήθεια.
translations.nb: Den eldre beboeren trenger hjelp i dag.
translations.id: Penghuni yang lebih tua butuh bantuan hari ini.
translations.sv: Den äldre hyresgästen behöver hjälp i dag.
translations.ro: Locatarul în vârstă are nevoie de ajutor astăzi.
translations.da: Den ældre beboer har brug for hjælp i dag.
translations.ja: 高齢の住人は今日助けが必要だ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular; determines the subject noun.
Attributive adjective in comparative degree; nominative masculine singular with weak inflection after definite article; modifies ‘Bewohner’.

Feminine noun in accusative singular; direct object of ‘braucht’.
